Index

Modules: tzutrader, tzutrader/core, tzutrader/data, tzutrader/declarative, tzutrader/declarative/parser, tzutrader/declarative/risk_management, tzutrader/declarative/schema, tzutrader/declarative/strategy_builder, tzutrader/declarative/validator, tzutrader/exports, tzutrader/indicators, tzutrader/portfolio, tzutrader/scanner, tzutrader/screener/alerts, tzutrader/screener/history, tzutrader/screener/parser, tzutrader/screener/reports, tzutrader/screener/schema, tzutrader/screener/screener, tzutrader/strategies/adx_trend, tzutrader/strategies/aroon, tzutrader/strategies/base, tzutrader/strategies/bollinger, tzutrader/strategies/cci, tzutrader/strategies/crossover, tzutrader/strategies/dual_momentum, tzutrader/strategies/filtered_mean_reversion, tzutrader/strategies/kama, tzutrader/strategies/keltner, tzutrader/strategies/macd, tzutrader/strategies/mfi, tzutrader/strategies/parabolic_sar, tzutrader/strategies/rsi, tzutrader/strategies/stochastic, tzutrader/strategies/triple_ma, tzutrader/strategies/volume_breakout, tzutrader/strategy, tzutrader/strategy_builder, tzutrader/trader.

API symbols

`$`:
  • core: proc `$`(ohlcv: OHLCV): string
  • core: proc `$`(signal: Signal): string
  • core: proc `$`(tx: Transaction): string
  • data: proc `$`(stream: CBHistory): string
  • data: proc `$`(stream: CSVDataStream): string
  • data: proc `$`(stream: CSVFileStreamer): string
  • data: proc `$`(ds: DataStream): string
  • data: proc `$`(interval: Interval): string
  • data: proc `$`(quote: Quote): string
  • data: proc `$`(stream: YFHistory): string
  • schema: proc `$`(op: ComparisonOp): string
  • schema: proc `$`(p: ParamValue): string
  • schema: proc `$`(loc: SourceLocation): string
  • portfolio: proc `$`(m: PerformanceMetrics): string
  • portfolio: proc `$`(p: Portfolio): string
  • portfolio: proc `$`(pos: PositionInfo): string
  • scanner: proc `$`(scanResult: ScanResult): string
  • alerts: proc `$`(alert: Alert): string
  • alerts: proc `$`(strength: AlertStrength): string
  • alerts: proc `$`(alertType: AlertType): string
  • schema: proc `$`(level: DetailLevel): string
  • schema: proc `$`(lookback: LookbackPeriod): string
  • schema: proc `$`(format: OutputFormat): string
  • trader: proc `$`(report: BacktestReport): string
`[]`:
  • indicators: proc `[]`[T](ind: Indicator[T]; key: int): T

  • indicators: type AD

  • validator: proc addError(vr: var ValidationResult; msg: string)

addWarning:

  • rsi: method analyze(s: RSIStrategy; data: seq[OHLCV]): seq[Signal]
  • stochastic: method analyze(s: StochasticStrategy; data: seq[OHLCV]): seq[Signal]

changePercent:

checkStopLoss:

  • risk_management: method checkStopLoss(rule: FixedPercentageStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool
  • risk_management: method checkStopLoss(rule: FixedPriceStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool
  • risk_management: method checkStopLoss(rule: StopLossRule; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool
  • risk_management: method checkStopLoss(rule: TrailingStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool

  • risk_management: method checkTakeProfit(rule: FixedPriceTakeProfit; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[ triggered: bool, exitPercent: float]
  • risk_management: method checkTakeProfit(rule: MultiLevelTakeProfit; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[ triggered: bool, exitPercent: float]
  • risk_management: method checkTakeProfit(rule: RiskRewardTakeProfit; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[ triggered: bool, exitPercent: float]
  • risk_management: method checkTakeProfit(rule: TakeProfitRule; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[ triggered: bool, exitPercent: float]

newAD:
  • indicators: proc newAD(memSize: int = 1): AD
newADX:
  • indicators: proc newADX(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): ADX
newADXTrendStrategy:
  • adx_trend: proc newADXTrendStrategy(period: int = 14; adxThreshold: float64 = 25.0; symbol: string = ""): ADXTrendStrategy
newAlert:
  • alerts: proc newAlert(symbol: string; strategyName: string; alertType: AlertType; price: float64; strength: AlertStrength = asModerate; indicators: Table[string, float64] = initTable[string, float64](); metadata: Table[string, string] = initTable[string, string]()): Alert
newAlertCollection:
  • alerts: proc newAlertCollection(alerts: seq[Alert]; totalSymbols: int; totalStrategies: int): AlertCollection
newAlertFromSignal:
  • alerts: proc newAlertFromSignal(signal: Signal; strategyName: string; strength: AlertStrength = asModerate; indicators: Table[ string, float64] = initTable[string, float64]()): Alert
newAndCondition:
  • schema: proc newAndCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML
newAROON:
  • indicators: proc newAROON(period: int = 25; memSize: int = 1): AROON
newAroonStrategy:
  • aroon: proc newAroonStrategy(period: int = 25; upThreshold: float64 = 70.0; downThreshold: float64 = 30.0; symbol: string = ""): AroonStrategy
newATR:
  • indicators: proc newATR(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): ATR
newATRBasedStopLoss:
  • risk_management: proc newATRBasedStopLoss(atrMultiplier: float; atrIndicatorId: string = "atr_14"): ATRBasedStopLoss
newBacktester:
  • trader: proc newBacktester(strategy: Strategy; initialCash: float64 = 100000.0; commission: float64 = 0.0; verbose: bool = false): Backtester
  • trader: proc newBacktester(strategy: Strategy; config: PortfolioConfig; verbose: bool = false): Backtester
newBatchOutput:
  • schema: proc newBatchOutput(formats: seq[string] = @["csv"]; comparisonReport: Option[string] = none(string); individualResults: Option[string] = none(string)): BatchOutputYAML
newBollingerBands:
  • indicators: proc newBollingerBands(period: int = 20; numStdDev: float64 = 2.0; memSize: int = 1): BollingerBands
newBollingerStrategy:
  • bollinger: proc newBollingerStrategy(period: int = 20; stdDev: float64 = 2.0; symbol: string = ""): BollingerStrategy
newBuiltInStrategy:
  • schema: proc newBuiltInStrategy(name: string; params: Table[string, ParamValue] = initTable[ string, ParamValue]()): ScreenerStrategyConfig
newCBHistory:
  • data: proc newCBHistory(symbol: string; start: string; endStr: string = ""; interval: Interval = Int1d): CBHistory
newCCI:
  • indicators: proc newCCI(period: int = 20; memSize: int = 1): CCI
newCCIStrategy:
  • cci: proc newCCIStrategy(period: int = 20; oversoldLevel: float64 = -100.0; overboughtLevel: float64 = 100.0; symbol: string = ""): CCIStrategy
newCMO:
  • indicators: proc newCMO(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): CMO
newCoinbaseDataConfig:
  • schema: proc newCoinbaseDataConfig(pairs: seq[string]; lookback: LookbackPeriod; interval: Interval = Int1h): ScreenerDataConfig
newCrossoverStrategy:
  • crossover: proc newCrossoverStrategy(fastPeriod: int = 50; slowPeriod: int = 200; symbol: string = ""): CrossoverStrategy
newCsvDataConfig:
  • schema: proc newCsvDataConfig(directory: string; lookback: Option[LookbackPeriod] = none(LookbackPeriod)): ScreenerDataConfig
newCSVDataStream:
  • data: proc newCSVDataStream(filename: string; symbol: string = ""): CSVDataStream
newCSVFileStreamer:
  • data: proc newCSVFileStreamer(filename: string; symbol: string = ""): CSVFileStreamer
newDataConfigCsv:
  • schema: proc newDataConfigCsv(csvFile: string): DataConfigYAML
newDataConfigYahoo:
  • schema: proc newDataConfigYahoo(symbols: seq[string]; startDate: string; endDate: string): DataConfigYAML
newDataStream:
  • data: proc newDataStream(symbol: string; interval: Interval = Int1d; useCache: bool = true): DataStream
newDEMA:
  • indicators: proc newDEMA(period: int; memSize: int = 1): DEMA
newDualMomentumStrategy:
  • dual_momentum: proc newDualMomentumStrategy(rocPeriod: int = 12; smaPeriod: int = 50; symbol: string = ""): DualMomentumStrategy
newEMA:
  • indicators: proc newEMA(period: int; alpha: float64 = 2.0; memSize: int = 1): EMA
newFilteredMeanReversionStrategy:
  • filtered_mean_reversion: proc newFilteredMeanReversionStrategy(rsiPeriod: int = 14; trendPeriod: int = 200; oversold: float64 = 30.0; overbought: float64 = 70.0; symbol: string = ""): FilteredMeanReversionStrategy
newFixedPercentageStopLoss:
  • risk_management: proc newFixedPercentageStopLoss(percentage: float): FixedPercentageStopLoss
newFixedPercentageTakeProfit:
  • risk_management: proc newFixedPercentageTakeProfit(percentage: float): FixedPercentageTakeProfit
newFixedPriceStopLoss:
  • risk_management: proc newFixedPriceStopLoss(price: float): FixedPriceStopLoss
newFixedPriceTakeProfit:
  • risk_management: proc newFixedPriceTakeProfit(price: float): FixedPriceTakeProfit
newIndicator:
  • indicators: proc newIndicator[T](memSize: int = 1): Indicator[T]
newKAMA:
  • indicators: proc newKAMA(period: int = 10; fastPeriod: int = 2; slowPeriod: int = 30; memSize: int = 1): KAMA
newKAMAStrategy:
  • kama: proc newKAMAStrategy(period: int = 10; fastPeriod: int = 2; slowPeriod: int = 30; symbol: string = ""): KAMAStrategy
newKeltnerChannelStrategy:
  • keltner: proc newKeltnerChannelStrategy(emaPeriod: int = 20; atrPeriod: int = 10; multiplier: float64 = 2.0; mode: KeltnerMode = Breakout; symbol: string = ""): KeltnerChannelStrategy
newLookbackPeriod:
  • schema: proc newLookbackPeriod(value: int; unit: TimeUnit): LookbackPeriod
newMA:
  • indicators: proc newMA(period: int; memSize: int = 1): MA
newMACD:
  • indicators: proc newMACD(shortPeriod: int = 12; longPeriod: int = 26; diffPeriod: int = 9; memSize: int = 1): MACD
newMACDStrategy:
  • macd: proc newMACDStrategy(fastPeriod: int = 12; slowPeriod: int = 26; signalPeriod: int = 9; symbol: string = ""): MACDStrategy
newMFI:
  • indicators: proc newMFI(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): MFI
newMFIStrategy:
  • mfi: proc newMFIStrategy(period: int = 14; oversold: float64 = 20.0; overbought: float64 = 80.0; symbol: string = ""): MFIStrategy
newMOM:
  • indicators: proc newMOM(period: int = 10; memSize: int = 1): MOM
newMultiLevelTakeProfit:
  • risk_management: proc newMultiLevelTakeProfit(levels: seq[TakeProfitLevel]): MultiLevelTakeProfit
newMV:
  • indicators: proc newMV(period: int; memSize: int = 1): MV
newNATR:
  • indicators: proc newNATR(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): NATR
newNoStopLoss:
  • risk_management: proc newNoStopLoss(): StopLossRule
newNoTakeProfit:
  • risk_management: proc newNoTakeProfit(): TakeProfitRule
newNotCondition:
  • schema: proc newNotCondition(condition: ConditionYAML): ConditionYAML
newOBV:
  • indicators: proc newOBV(memSize: int = 1): OBV
newOrCondition:
  • schema: proc newOrCondition(conditions: seq[ConditionYAML]): ConditionYAML
newOutputConfig:
  • schema: proc newOutputConfig(format: OutputFormat = ofTerminal; detailLevel: DetailLevel = dlSummary; filepath: Option[string] = none(string); saveHistory: bool = false; historyDir: string = "screener_history"): ScreenerOutputConfig
newParabolicSARStrategy:
  • parabolic_sar: proc newParabolicSARStrategy(acceleration: float64 = 0.02; maximum: float64 = 0.2; symbol: string = ""): ParabolicSARStrategy
newParamBool:
  • schema: proc newParamBool(val: bool): ParamValue
newParamFloat:
  • schema: proc newParamFloat(val: float): ParamValue
newParamInt:
  • schema: proc newParamInt(val: int): ParamValue
newParamString:
  • schema: proc newParamString(val: string): ParamValue
newPortfolio:
  • portfolio: proc newPortfolio(initialCash: float64 = 100000.0; commission: float64 = 0.0; minCommission: float64 = 0.0): Portfolio
  • portfolio: proc newPortfolio(config: PortfolioConfig): Portfolio
newPortfolioConfig:
  • schema: proc newPortfolioConfig(initialCash: float = 100000.0; commission: float = 0.001; minCommission: Option[float] = none(float); riskFreeRate: Option[float] = none(float)): PortfolioConfigYAML
newPositionState:
  • risk_management: proc newPositionState(entryPrice: float): PositionState
newPPO:
  • indicators: proc newPPO(fastPeriod: int = 12; slowPeriod: int = 26; signalPeriod: int = 9; memSize: int = 1): PPO
newPSAR:
  • indicators: proc newPSAR(acceleration: float64 = 0.02; maximum: float64 = 0.2; memSize: int = 1): PSAR
newRiskRewardTakeProfit:
  • risk_management: proc newRiskRewardTakeProfit(ratio: float; stopLossRule: StopLossRule): RiskRewardTakeProfit
newROC:
  • indicators: proc newROC(period: int = 12; memSize: int = 1): ROC
newROI:
  • indicators: proc newROI(memSize: int = 1): ROI
newRSI:
  • indicators: proc newRSI(period: int = 14; memSize: int = 1): RSI
newRSIStrategy:
  • rsi: proc newRSIStrategy(period: int = 14; oversold: float64 = 30.0; overbought: float64 = 70.0; symbol: string = ""): RSIStrategy
newScanner:
  • scanner: proc newScanner(strategy: Strategy; symbols: seq[string]; initialCash: float64 = 100000.0; commission: float64 = 0.0; verbose: bool = false): Scanner
newScreener:
  • screener: proc newScreener(config: ScreenerConfig): Screener
newScreenerConfig:
  • schema: proc newScreenerConfig(metadata: MetadataYAML; strategies: seq[ScreenerStrategyConfig]; data: ScreenerDataConfig; output: ScreenerOutputConfig = newOutputConfig(); filters: ScreenerFilters = newScreenerFilters()): ScreenerConfig
newScreenerFilters:
  • schema: proc newScreenerFilters(signalTypes: seq[AlertType] = @[atBuySignal, atSellSignal]; minStrength: AlertStrength = asModerate; topN: Option[int] = none(int)): ScreenerFilters
newSignal:
  • core: proc newSignal(position: Position; symbol: string; price: float64; reason: string = ""): Signal
newSimpleCondition:
  • schema: proc newSimpleCondition(left: string; op: ComparisonOp; right: string): ConditionYAML
newSMA:
  • indicators: proc newSMA(period: int; memSize: int = 1): SMA
newSTDEV:
  • indicators: proc newSTDEV(period: int; memSize: int = 1): STDEV
newSTOCH:
  • indicators: proc newSTOCH(kPeriod: int = 14; dPeriod: int = 3; memSize: int = 1): STOCH
newStochasticStrategy:
  • stochastic: proc newStochasticStrategy(kPeriod: int = 14; dPeriod: int = 3; oversold: float64 = 20.0; overbought: float64 = 80.0; symbol: string = ""): StochasticStrategy
newSTOCHRSI:
  • indicators: proc newSTOCHRSI(rsiPeriod: int = 14; period: int = 14; kPeriod: int = 3; dPeriod: int = 3; memSize: int = 1): STOCHRSI
newStrategyBuilder:
  • strategy_builder: proc newStrategyBuilder(strategy: Strategy): StrategyBuilder
newStrategyConfig:
  • core: proc newStrategyConfig(name: string; params: Table[string, float64] = initTable[string, float64]()): StrategyConfig
newStrategyVariant:
  • schema: proc newStrategyVariant(file: string; name: string; overrides: Option[ StrategyOverrides] = none(StrategyOverrides)): StrategyVariantYAML
newSweepParameter:
  • schema: proc newSweepParameter(path: string; range: SweepRange): SweepParameter
newSweepRangeLinear:
  • schema: proc newSweepRangeLinear(min: float; max: float; step: float): SweepRange
newSweepRangeList:
  • schema: proc newSweepRangeList(values: seq[float]): SweepRange
newTEMA:
  • indicators: proc newTEMA(period: int; memSize: int = 1): TEMA
newTrailingStopLoss:
  • risk_management: proc newTrailingStopLoss(trailPercentage: float; activationProfit: float = 0.0): TrailingStopLoss
newTRANGE:
  • indicators: proc newTRANGE(memSize: int = 1): TRANGE
newTransaction:
  • core: proc newTransaction(symbol: string; action: Position; quantity, price, commission: float64): Transaction
newTRIMA:
  • indicators: proc newTRIMA(period: int; memSize: int = 1): TRIMA
newTripleMAStrategy:
  • triple_ma: proc newTripleMAStrategy(fastPeriod: int = 20; mediumPeriod: int = 50; slowPeriod: int = 200; symbol: string = ""): TripleMAStrategy
newValidationResult:
  • validator: proc newValidationResult(): ValidationResult
newVolumeBreakoutStrategy:
  • volume_breakout: proc newVolumeBreakoutStrategy(period: int = 20; volumeMultiplier: float64 = 1.5; symbol: string = ""): VolumeBreakoutStrategy
newYahooDataConfig:
  • schema: proc newYahooDataConfig(symbols: seq[string]; lookback: LookbackPeriod; interval: Interval = Int1d): ScreenerDataConfig
newYamlStrategy:
  • schema: proc newYamlStrategy(filePath: string): ScreenerStrategyConfig
newYFHistory:
  • data: proc newYFHistory(symbol: string; start: string; endStr: string = ""; interval: Interval = Int1d): YFHistory

onBar:

  • bollinger: method onBar(s: BollingerStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal
  • cci: method onBar(s: CCIStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal
  • crossover: method onBar(s: CrossoverStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal
  • dual_momentum: method onBar(s: DualMomentumStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal

  • keltner: method onBar(s: KeltnerChannelStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal

  • mfi: method onBar(s: MFIStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal

  • triple_ma: method onBar(s: TripleMAStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal
  • volume_breakout: method onBar(s: VolumeBreakoutStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal

  • indicators: proc update(kama: KAMA; value: float64): float64

  • indicators: proc update(mv: MV; value: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(natr: NATR; high, low, close: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(obv: OBV; closePrice, volume: float64): float64

  • indicators: proc update(psar: PSAR; high, low, close: float64): PSARResult
  • indicators: proc update(roc: ROC; value: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(roi: ROI; value: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(rsi: RSI; openPrice, closePrice: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(stdev: STDEV; value: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(stoch: STOCH; high, low, close: float64): StochResult
  • indicators: proc update(stochRsi: STOCHRSI; openPrice, closePrice: float64): StochResult

  • indicators: proc update(tr: TRANGE; high, low, close: float64): float64
  • indicators: proc update(trima: TRIMA; value: float64): float64
updateIndicator:
  • strategy_builder: proc updateIndicator(ind: IndicatorInstance; bar: OHLCV; source: string = "close")
updatePrice:
  • portfolio: proc updatePrice(pos: var PositionInfo; currentPrice: float64)
updatePrices:
  • portfolio: proc updatePrices(p: Portfolio; prices: Table[string, float64])
updateState:
  • risk_management: proc updateState(state: var PositionState; currentPrice: float)
validateCondition:
  • validator: proc validateCondition(condition: ConditionYAML; indicatorIds: HashSet[string]): ValidationResult
validateConfig:
  • screener: proc validateConfig(config: ScreenerConfig): tuple[valid: bool, errors: seq[string]]
validateIndicators:
  • validator: proc validateIndicators(indicators: seq[IndicatorYAML]): ValidationResult
validateMetadata:
  • validator: proc validateMetadata(metadata: MetadataYAML): ValidationResult
validateRule:
  • validator: proc validateRule(rule: RuleYAML; indicatorIds: HashSet[string]): ValidationResult
validateStrategy:
  • validator: proc validateStrategy(strategy: StrategyYAML): ValidationResult
ValidationError:
  • validator: object ValidationError
ValidationResult:
  • validator: object ValidationResult
ValidationWarning:
  • validator: object ValidationWarning
VolumeBreakoutStrategy:
  • volume_breakout: type VolumeBreakoutStrategy
WarningLevel:
  • validator: enum WarningLevel
WinRate:
  • scanner: RankBy.WinRate
withATRStop:
  • strategy_builder: proc withATRStop(sb: StrategyBuilder; multiplier: float; indicatorId: string = "atr_14"): StrategyBuilder
withFixedStopLoss:
  • strategy_builder: proc withFixedStopLoss(strategy: Strategy; percentage: float): Strategy
  • strategy_builder: proc withFixedStopLoss(sb: StrategyBuilder; percentage: float): StrategyBuilder
withFixedTakeProfit:
  • strategy_builder: proc withFixedTakeProfit(strategy: Strategy; percentage: float): Strategy
  • strategy_builder: proc withFixedTakeProfit(sb: StrategyBuilder; percentage: float): StrategyBuilder
withMultiLevelProfit:

withPriceStopLoss:
  • strategy_builder: proc withPriceStopLoss(sb: StrategyBuilder; price: float): StrategyBuilder
withPriceTakeProfit:
  • strategy_builder: proc withPriceTakeProfit(sb: StrategyBuilder; price: float): StrategyBuilder
withRiskManagement:
  • strategy_builder: proc withRiskManagement(strategy: Strategy; stopLoss: StopLossRule = nil; takeProfit: TakeProfitRule = nil): Strategy
withRiskReward:
  • strategy_builder: proc withRiskReward(sb: StrategyBuilder; ratio: float): StrategyBuilder
withStopLoss:
  • strategy_builder: proc withStopLoss(sb: StrategyBuilder; rule: StopLossRule): StrategyBuilder
withTakeProfit:
  • strategy_builder: proc withTakeProfit(sb: StrategyBuilder; rule: TakeProfitRule): StrategyBuilder
withTrailingStop:
  • strategy_builder: proc withTrailingStop(strategy: Strategy; trailPct: float; activationPct: float = 0.0): Strategy

wlHigh:
  • validator: WarningLevel.wlHigh

  • validator: WarningLevel.wlInfo

  • validator: WarningLevel.wlLow
